description: You are an MEP BIM Coordinator working on the pre-loaded FZK-Haus residential building model. Model three placeholder sanitary fixtures in the upper floor bathroom and classify them as IfcSanitaryTerminal objects. The first must have a PredefinedType of WCSEAT or TOILETPAN, the second WASHHANDBASIN or SINK, and the third BATH or SHOWER. Spatially assign all three fixtures to the 'Obergeschoss' storey and export the enriched project as an IFC file to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_plumbing.ifc.
